problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Spintronics. Spintronics for low-power data storage directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
